metadata.name: Urethane Composites
metadata.title: Urethane Composites Laser Cleaning Settings
metadata.description: Detailed machine settings, parameter relationships, diagnostic procedures, and troubleshooting guides for optimizing urethane composites laser cleaning operations.

author.name: Todd Dunning
author.title: MA
credentials: MA Optics and Photonics, UC Irvine, 2019
author.imageAlt: Todd Dunning, MA, Junior Optical Materials Specialist at Coherent Inc., with precision optics tools

powerRange.description: Optimal average power for Urethane Composites cleaning without thermal damage

wavelength.description: Near-IR wavelength optimized for Urethane absorption characteristics

spotSize.description: Beam spot diameter for effective cleaning resolution

repetitionRate.description: Optimal repetition rate for efficient cleaning with thermal management

fluenceThreshold.description: Fluence threshold for Urethane Composites ablation

pulseWidth.description: Nanosecond pulse duration for controlled ablation of composite surface

scanSpeed.description: Optimal scanning speed for uniform cleaning coverage

passCount.description: Recommended number of passes for complete contaminant removal

overlapRatio.description: Optimal beam overlap for uniform cleaning without excessive heating
